name: Known - Incredible770
description: Known is the keeper of Silverado. He is wendigo-like creature because he has a shady appearance, with nearly all of his body being covered in pitch black with only his face being exposed. He has two visible antlers and pitch black eyes with white pupils with slightly visible lashes. He's also Joyful's guardian, whoever bothers Joyful, he's gonna kill them.
creator: Azkahadi25
